title: Female Villagers
description: This texture pack changes the defalt villager into a chistmas themed girl!
body:
This texture pack adds brand new Femake Villagers to minecraft! you dont need optifine or anything else to run this pack! pure vanilla. 

This pack if christamas themed meaning the villagers will all be wearing santa hats! and red and green!

Please email me here with any issues: wowmoonwow@proton.me
